label: Load Schema
description: Load a JSON Schema from a file or URL and store it as a reusable variable for schema assertions.

params.name: name
params.description: Name for this schema (used as variable reference)

params.name: source
params.description: Where to load the schema from

params.name: path
params.description: Schema file from the project (relative path auto-filled)

params.name: url
params.description: URL to fetch the schema from when source is 'url'

params.name: schema
params.description: Inline schema definition when source is 'inline'

outputs.name: schema
outputs.description: The loaded JSON Schema object (referenceable as @name)
